summary: On March 3-4, 2025, operators of the Russian "Rubicon" Center conducted strikes in the Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman directions, targeting Ukrainian Armed Forces personnel and fixed-wing UAVs, destroying 103 targets on March 4 and 191 on March 3. The "Rubicon" Center has published over 19,000 episodes of enemy target destruction, with 34.7% being unmanned systems, 16.5% communication and observation equipment, 15.9% ground protected targets, 13.4% unarmored vehicles, and 9.6% armored vehicles. Ukrainian forces are using a Chinese PTS-303 rotating antenna system (3-5 thousand hryvnias) for FPV drone radio-electronic warfare, capable of 24V and 220V operation. Ukrainian reconnaissance is focusing on locating and destroying Russian reconnaissance and strike drones, their control stations, and UAV control panels, which are difficult to hide due to their antennas. An FPV drone narrowly missed a Russian Mi-8 helicopter.
